name: programmatic-skills
description: 72 skills, 7 specialist agents, and 14 workflow loops for operating as a programmatic trader, analyst, and account-operations specialist across DV360, Google Ads, Amazon DSP, StackAdapt, and The Trade Desk. Reads and recommends, with human-gated changes.

interface.shortDescription: Multi-DSP trading, analytics, and account-ops workflows for AI coding agents
interface.longDescription: A library of agent skills, specialist agents, and repeatable workflows that let an assistant plan and build campaigns, choose bid strategies, manage pacing and budgets, set up deals and brand safety, pull and interpret reports, run measurement and attribution, QA accounts, and troubleshoot delivery across DV360, Google Ads, Amazon DSP, StackAdapt, and The Trade Desk. DSP-agnostic foundations keep it extensible to other demand-side platforms. It reads and recommends; a human approves any spend-affecting change.
defaultPrompt: Help me structure and launch a DV360 campaign.
Analyze my campaign pacing and recommend optimizations.
